_note: Per-game visual-identity research for the follow-overlay sprite + theme work. Sources: Steam store pages (Claude in Chrome, 2026-06-02) + established franchise art direction. item=most iconic object for a sprite; style=aesthetic cue; palette=color direction (prompt + Phase 4 bar/glow); fontWeb=Google-Fonts-ish match for Phase 4 promo/counter. Extend this for the ~20 Triple-C games at Phase 3.
_rule: GAME-ACCURATE SVG (Clay 2026-06-02, supersedes cartoon-only): NO single style across games. Each hand-crafted SVG sprite matches how that game's OWN in-game UI/asset actually looks -- like the real item icon lifted out of the game. Push DEPTH: many paths, gradients (linear+radial), multiple shading layers, fine textural detail, rim/specular light -- premium illustration polish, never a flat sticker or doodle. Per-game look lives in each game's `styleNote`. Pure SVG/code, $0 (Replicate is dropped for overlay sprites). Idle peeks stay items-only (a card-face like Balatro's Jimbo counts as a card OBJECT, allowed). Source: discord-bot/tools/svg-samples/.

eldenring.item: a golden flask with a bronze cap and a red wax seal, glowing crimson liquid inside (a Flask of Crimson Tears)
eldenring.style: game-accurate: ornate medieval-fantasy glass flask cradled in gold filigree, painterly red-glass glow, somber palette, decorative scrollwork cap (matches the in-game Flask of Crimson Tears icon)
eldenring.palette: tarnished gold and bright blood-crimson, with deep shadow accents

cyberpunk2077.item: a chunky yellow cyberware chip with magenta and cyan neon accents
cyberpunk2077.style: game-accurate: glitchy neon Night City HUD chip, circuitry traces, holographic interference scanlines, sharp angular edges, chromatic glitch offsets in cyan/magenta
cyberpunk2077.palette: signature acid yellow #FCEE0A with hot-magenta and cyan neon accents on black

supermarket_simulator.item: a chunky shopping cart full of colorful grocery boxes
supermarket_simulator.style: game-accurate: clean low-poly casual-sim shopping cart, minimal stylization, simple flat facet shading, readable everyday object, light outlines
supermarket_simulator.palette: friendly grocery green and warm white with bright red accents

phasmophobia.item: an EMF reader handheld device with a glowing green LED display
phasmophobia.style: game-accurate: dim atmospheric realism, scuffed dark-plastic casing with subtle sheen, glass screen with phosphor-green readout + reflection, restrained palette
phasmophobia.palette: dark charcoal device with bright phosphor-green glow accents

balatro.item: the Jimbo joker card: red three-point jester hat, round eyes + small smile, blue ruffled collar, JOKER text up both side edges, thin red border
balatro.style: game-accurate: flat minimalist Balatro deck-card aesthetic, stark clean color blocks, thin border, very light shading (the game's UI is famously flat)
balatro.palette: deep indigo-navy, card-suit red and blue, bright gold accents

ball_x_pit.item: a colorful cluster of glossy arcade balls
ball_x_pit.style: game-accurate: vibrant retro-arcade neon, glossy balls with radial gloss + chromatic cyan/magenta rim light, glow halo, energetic
ball_x_pit.palette: vivid saturated arcade colors - electric cyan, magenta and lime
